El vestuario
"

Hoy el estadio lleva tu nombre, Dani.

Hay personas que no solo juegan el partido — lo cambian. Que no siguen la jugada, la crean. Eso eres tú: alguien que deja huella en cada campo que pisa.

Que este año que empieza esté lleno de goles, victorias y momentos que valga la pena celebrar. Te lo mereces todo, crack.

Con todo el cariño del mundo 🏆
EVONCIA · JAIMOTE · KARMELOTE · MAMITA ❤️

IRELAND
Next chapter
From España 🇪🇸
To Ireland 🇮🇪
Mission Conquer it
"

Dani — 25 is not just a birthday. It's a launchpad.

You're packing your bags, crossing the sea, and betting on yourself. That takes more courage than anything. Ireland doesn't know it yet, but someone special is coming its way.

Work hard, make friends, explore every corner of that green island — and know that no matter how far you go, we'll always be cheering for you from the stands. Loudly. Embarrassingly. With pride.

Go get it, Dani. The world is your pitch. 🌍⚽

Happy Birthday & Good Luck · We've got your back always 🍀

⚽ Hecho con amor para Dani · ¡Felicidades! ⚽

🎂 Cumpleaños Feliz
